items.name: Green Alien Gir Ushanka w/ Black Messy Hair
items.description:
🌟Dont forget to Like the Item🌟

Fun silly alien ushanka hair featuring a green cool alien-style ushanka paired with messy brown hair for a relaxed, alternative look. This ushanka hat with hair is perfect for alt outfits, casual avatars, cozy winter looks, and nostalgic roleplay. The messy brown hair adds a natural, laid-back vibe while the alien ushanka brings a playful, standout style. Great for aesthetic outfits, photos, and standing out in lobbies.
